zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice FitzPiers於大約1234年出生在英國哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛時，她的父親Reginald FitzPiers28歲，母親Alice Stanford16歲。她於1256年6月29日與John Saint John在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1305年在她的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice FitzPiers于大约1234年出生在英国哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛时，她的父亲Reginald FitzPiers28岁，母亲Alice Stanford16岁。她于1256年6月29日与John Saint John在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1305年在她的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice FitzPiers was born about 1234, in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, her father, Reginald FitzPiers, was 28 and her mother, Alice Stanford, was 16. She married John Saint John on 29 June 1256, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1305, in her hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in Old Basing, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice FitzPiers est née environ 1234, à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Reginald FitzPiers, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Stanford, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John Saint John le 29 juin 1256, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1305, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice FitzPiers um 1234 in Old Basing, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald FitzPiers 28 und ihre Mutter Alice Stanford 16. Sie hat am 29. Juni 1256 in England, United Kingdom John Saint John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1305 im Alter von 72 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Old Basing, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzPiers è nata il circa 1234 nel Old Basing, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Reginald FitzPiers, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Alice Stanford, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato John Saint John il 29 giugno 1256, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1305, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Basing, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice FitzPiersが約1234年にイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングで生まれた時，父Reginald FitzPiersは28歳，母Alice Stanfordは16歳であった。1256年6月29日にイギリスイギリスでJohn Saint Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1305年に故郷で72歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzPiers(이)가 대략 1234년 영국 함프실르 드 바징에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald FitzPiers(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Stanford(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1256년 6월 29일 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Saint John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1305년 그녀의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 드 바징에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzPiers nasceu aproximadamente 1234, em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald FitzPiers, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stanford, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John Saint John em 29 de junho de 1256, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1305, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice FitzPiers родилась около 1234 г. в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald FitzPiers было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Stanford, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Saint John 29 июня 1256 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1305 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice FitzPiers nació aproximadamente 1234, en Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald FitzPiers, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Stanford, tenía 16 años. Se casó con John Saint John el 29 de junio de 1256, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1305, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
